title: onosma arenaria subsp. vaudensis
intro: Onosma arenaria subsp. vaudensis, also known as Vaud onosma, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the Apocynaceae family. It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which have been traditionally valued for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Vaud onosma include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and boosting the immune system, making it a popular choice in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Vaud onosma are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can also be used topically as an ointment or cream to treat skin irritations and wounds.
